questions.question: Find the sum to 20 terms of the series 3(4)2 + 5(5)2 + 7(6)2 + ....
Find the last digit of 1! + 2! + 3! + ... 50!
questions.explanation: From 5! onward, all the numbers are divisible by 10 so we just need to check till 4!. for 1! = 1 For 2! = 2 For 3! = 6 For 4! = 4 Sum = 1 + 2 + 6 + 4 = 13 so the last digit is 3.

questions.question: If 4747 + 47 is divided by 48, the remainder is
What digits should come in place of @ and & respectively, if the number 51523@& is divisible by 4 and 5?
questions.explanation: The given number is divisible by 5 only if & has the value 0 or 5. For number to be divisible by 4 the last two digits of the number must be a multiple of 4. So if & is 0, @ can be 2, 4, 6 or 8. If & is 5, @ cannot have any value for which it is divisible by 4. In our case (4,0) is the only option given.

questions.question: Arpan took a loan of Rs 10000 from HDFC bank on simple interest and paid it back through three equal yearly installments of Rs 4000. At what rate of interest bank has offered the loan to Arpan?
If (1 - 1/x) = 11/x2, what is the value of √(x+3) + 1/√(x+3)?
If p = (3 - 2√2), then what is the value of (3p2 - 4p + 10)/(p2 - 4p + 2)?
The ratio of 25% of X to 65% of Y to 75% of Z is 5:26:15. If one-sixteenth of their sum(x,y and z) is equal to 10, what is the value of X - 2Y + 3Z?

Two cylindrical containers are filled with water. The radius and height of the first are 12 cm and 26 cm and of the second are 6 cm and 58 cm respectively. Find the radius of the cylindrical vessel 32 cm in height, which can just hold the water of the two given containers?
questions.explanation: Volume of the first container = π (12)² (26) = 3744π Volume of the second container = π (6)² (58) = 2088π Total volume = 3744 π + 2088 π = 5832 π πr² (32) = 5832 π => r2 = 5832/32 = 182.25 Or, r = 13.5 cm

questions.question: If the age of Atul is one-third the age of Deepak now, and was one-fourth the age of Deepak 4 yr ago, then how old will Deepak be 5 yr from now?
questions.explanation: Let the present age of Atul and Deepak be x and y respectively. Then x=1/3y and (x - 4) = ¼ (y - 4) or, 4x - 16 = y - 4 or, 4x - 16 = 3x - 4 or, x = 16 - 4 = 12 From Eqs. (i) and (ii), y = 36 yr and x = 12 yr Hence, required age = (y + 5) = (36 + 5 )yrs. = 41 years.

questions.question: In the figure D is the centre of the circle, B is a point on the circumference of the circle and ABCD is a square. Find the ratio of the perimeter of the square ABCD and the circumference of the circle. (Take π = 22/7)
questions.explanation: Let the radius of the circle be r units. Therefore, the diagonal of the square, DB = r Then the side of the square = r/√2 units Perimeter of the square = 4 x r/√2 = 2√2 r units Circumference of the circle = 2πr = 44r/7 units Required ratio = 2√2 : 44/7 = 7:11√2

questions.question: The minimum value of sin2 ø + cos2 ø + sec2 ø + cosec2 ø + tan2 ø + cot2 ø is
questions.explanation: sin2 ø + cos2 ø + sec2 ø + cosec2 ø + tan2 ø + cot2 ø = (sin2 ø + cos2 ø) + (sec2 ø - tan2 ø) + (cosec2 ø - cot2 ø) + cot2 ø + tan2 ø + tan2 ø + cot2 ø = 1 + 1 + 1 + 2(tan2 ø + cot2 ø) = 3 + 2((tan ø - cot ø)2 + 2 tan ø cot ø) = 3 + 2((tan ø - cot ø)2 + 2) = 3 + 4 + 2(tan ø - cot ø)2 = 7 + 2(tan ø - cot ø)2 > 7 (since, (tan ø - cot ø)2 > 0)

questions.question: In the given figure, BC is the diameter of the circle with center O. find ∠OAD.
questions.explanation: In AOB, OA = OB(radii) Hence ∠OBA = 50 Therefore ∠ADC = 130 (opposite ∠ in a cyclic quadrilateral) So, ∠DAC = 30 We know that angle in a diameter is right angle. Hence, ∠OAC = 90-50 = 40 ∠OAD = ∠OAC + ∠DAC = 40+30 = 70

questions.question: If sinθ + cosθ=3/2, then find the value of (sinθ)4+(cosθ)4.
questions.explanation: Given that, sinθ + cosθ=3/2 (sinθ + cosθ)2=9/4 (Sinθ)2+ (cosθ)2+2*sinθ* cosθ=9/4 1+2*sinθ* cosθ=9/4 2*sinθ* cosθ=9/4-1=5/4 sinθ* cosθ=5/8 Therefore (sinθ)2*(cosθ)2=25/64 Now (sinθ)4+(cosθ)4=((Sinθ)2+(cosθ)2)2 - 2*(sinθ)2* (cosθ)2 => (sinθ)4+(cosθ)4= 1 - 2*(sinθ)2*(cosθ)2 => (sinθ)4+(cosθ)4= 1-2*(25/64) => (sinθ)4+(cosθ)4= 7/32

questions.question: There were 25 students in a hostel. Due to the admission of 5 new students, the expenses of the mess were increased by Rs. 35 per day while the average expenditure per head reduced by Re 1. What was the original expenditure of the mess?
questions.explanation: Let the original average expenditure be Rs x. Then, 30(x - 1) - 25x = 35 =>30x - 30 - 25x = 35 =>5x - 30 = 35 =>5x = 65 =>x = 13 Original expenditure = Rs (25 x 13) = 325

questions.question: There are two mixtures of honey and water, the quantity of honey in them being 25% and 75% of the mixture. If 2 gallons of the first are mixed with 3 gallons of the second, what will be the ratio of honey to water in the new mixture?
In a stream that is running at 3.5 km/h, a motorboat goes 8.4 km upstream and comes back to the starting point in 60 minutes. Find the speed of the motorboat in still water?
questions.explanation: Let the speed of the motorboat be s km/h. Speed upstream = s - 3.5 Speed downstream = s + 3.5 Total time = 8.4/(s - 3.5) + 8.4/(s + 3.5) = 1 => 8.4s + 29.4 + 8.4s - 29.4 = s2 - 12.25 => s2 - 16.8s - 12.25 = 0 => (s - 17.5)(s + 0.7) = 0 => s = 17.5 (since speed cannot be negative)

questions.question: A group of workers accepted to do a piece of work in 25 days. If 6 of them did not turn up for the work and the remaining workers did the work in 40 days, then the original number of workers was
questions.explanation: Let original number of workers be x. Then, total work = 25x When, 6 people did not turn up, total work = 40(x-6) Since total work is same, => 25x = 40x - 240 25x = 240 or x = 16

questions.question: The expression cos6x +sin6x + 3cos2x sin2x is equal to
questions.explanation: cos6x +sin6x + 3cos2x sin2x = (cos2)3 + (sin2)3 + 3sin2x cos2x (sin2x + cos2x) = (cos2x + sin2x)3 = 1

questions.question: Total number of employees in ICICI Bank and HDFC bank together in the year 2004 was approximately what percent of ICICI and HDFC bank together in year 2007?
questions.explanation: In the year 2004, employees in ICICI +HDFC bank = (2.5+3) = 5.5 X 1000 = 5500 In the year 2007, employees in ICICI +HDFC bank = (3.5+3) = 6.5 X 1000 = 6500 Required percentage = 5500/6500 x 100 = 84.61% » 85%. Hence, option 1 is correct.

questions.question: What is the approximate average number of employees in SBI over all the years together?
What is the approximate % increase in intake of ICICI bank from years 2003-2006 to 2004-2007?
questions.explanation: Employee intake of ICICI bank during 2003-2006 = (1+2.5+3+2.5) x 1000 = 9 x 1000 = 9000 Employee intake of ICICI bank during 2004-2007 = (2.5+3+2.5+3.5) x 1000 = 11500 % increase = (2500/9000)x 100 = 27.77% Hence, correct option is 2.

questions.question: Out of 3 banks, which bank succeeded in recruiting the most number of employees during the given years?
questions.explanation: No. of employees recruited by SBI = (1+2+1.5+2.5+3+2.5) x 1000 = 12500 No. of employees recruited by ICICI Bank = (1.5+1+2.5+3+2.5+3.5) x 1000 = 14 x 1000 = 14000 No. of employees recruited by HDFC bank = (0.5+2.5+3+3.5+3.5+3)x1000 16x1000 =16000. Clearly, HDFC bank recruited maximum number of employees. So, option 3 is correct.

questions.question: In ΔABC, ∠A = 90°, AD ⊥ BC and ∠B = 45°. If AB = x, then the value of BD in terms of x is
questions.explanation: In ΔADB, cos 45 = BD/AB = 1/√2 So, BD = AB/√2 = x/√2

questions.question: A dealer was giving a 20% discount on the marked price of a phone. Raju used his credit card and got a further rebate of Rs 300. If the dealer had purchased the phone for Rs 5000 and made a 10% profit on the sale, how much high was the marked price than the cost price?
questions.explanation: SP of the phone = 5000x1.1 = Rs 5500. Price before the use of credit card = Rs 5800. Since there was 20% discount, marked price = 5800 x 100/80 = Rs 7250 Required percentage = (7250-5000)/5000 x 100 = 45%
